overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial bodies; each orbits the center with velocity perpendicular to its radius vector.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Center Attraction
overridableConfigKeys.description: Linear central-force constant; acceleration toward the center scales with distance times this value.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Center X
overridableConfigKeys.description: X coordinate of the central attractor bodies orbit around.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Center Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y coordinate of the central attractor bodies orbit around.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-physics / CircularMotionOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

bodies.description: Initial bodies; each orbits the center with velocity perpendicular to its radius vector.

centerK.description: Linear central-force constant; acceleration toward the center scales with distance times this value.

centerX.description: X coordinate of the central attractor bodies orbit around.

centerY.description: Y coordinate of the central attractor bodies orbit around.

running.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

showVelocity.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

velocityScale.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial bodies; each starts high with zero velocity so it drops straight down and bounces.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Damping
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of velocity retained each tick (air resistance).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gravity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Downward acceleration added to each body's vy every tick.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels; bounds the bounce.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Restitution
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of speed kept when a body bounces off the floor or a wall.

overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the bounce.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds body movement.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial bodies; the block starts on the ramp near the top and slides down.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Damping
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of velocity retained each tick (rolling/air resistance along the ramp).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gravity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Downward acceleration added to the block's vy every tick before the ramp projection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Ramp Start X
overridableConfigKeys.description: X coordinate of the ramp's high (top) end.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Ramp End X
overridableConfigKeys.description: X coordinate of the ramp's low (bottom) end.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Ramp Start Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y coordinate of the ramp's high (top) end.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Ramp End Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y coordinate of the ramp's low (bottom) end.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Shapes
overridableConfigKeys.description: Static ramp line drawn by the physics-canvas between the incline's endpoints.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-physics / OrbitMotionOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

bodies.description: Initial bodies; the sun is static, each planet starts with velocity perpendicular to its radius vector for a near-circular orbit.

centerX.description: X coordinate of the fixed central mass planets orbit.

centerY.description: Y coordinate of the fixed central mass planets orbit.

gm.description: GM of the central mass; scales the inverse-square acceleration toward the center.

running.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

showVelocity.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

velocityScale.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial bodies; the pivot is static, the bob starts off to the side so it swings.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Constraints
overridableConfigKeys.description: String linking the pivot to the bob, drawn by the physics-canvas.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Damping
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of the bob's velocity retained each tick (air resistance).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gravity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Downward acceleration added to the bob's vy every tick before the length projection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Length
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rigid string length — the radius the bob is projected back onto each tick.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Pivot X
overridableConfigKeys.description: X coordinate of the fixed pivot the bob swings about.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Pivot Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y coordinate of the fixed pivot the bob swings about.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial photons; each travels in a straight line at constant speed and bounces off the box walls.

overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Static reflecting frame line drawn by the physics-canvas — the mirror surface the photons bounce off.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each photon's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the reflecting box.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Anchor X
overridableConfigKeys.description: Horizontal position each body oscillates around.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial bodies; each oscillates around anchorX (300) by Hooke's law.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Damping
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of velocity retained each tick (energy loss).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Spring Constant
overridableConfigKeys.description: Restoring-force strength pulling each body toward the anchor (Hooke's law k).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds body position.

Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). anchorX.description: Horizontal position each body oscillates around.

bodies.description: Initial bodies; each oscillates around anchorX (300) by Hooke's law.

damping.description: Fraction of velocity retained each tick (energy loss).

running.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

showVelocity.description: Draw each body's velocity vector as an arrow.

springK.description: Restoring-force strength pulling each body toward the anchor (Hooke's law k).

velocityScale.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows.

width.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds body position.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: 21 fixed-x points at rest height 200, with a triangular pulse near the center (p8..p12).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Damping
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fraction of vertical velocity retained each tick (energy loss as the wave propagates).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the sim.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Velocity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Draw each point's velocity vector as an arrow — off by default since 21 arrows clutter the waveform.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Spacing
overridableConfigKeys.description: Horizontal distance between adjacent points.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tension
overridableConfigKeys.description: Coupling strength (k) pulling each point toward its neighbors' average height — the discrete wave equation's spring constant.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Velocity Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Length multiplier for the velocity arrows, when shown.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: X Origin
overridableConfigKeys.description: X coordinate of the first (fixed) point; used to derive each point's index from its x.
